ddls:
CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the project category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone information for the task (e.g., 0.1, none) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., resolved, in progress) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the task (e.g., almost 13 years old, over 12 years old) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for task completion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, team leader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment belongs to */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_comments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the audit log belongs to */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)
